title: rosa alpina subsp. aculeata
intro: Rosa alpina subsp. aculeata, also known as the alpine rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa alpina subsp. aculeata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, among others. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal medicine to create topical creams and ointments for skin issues.
